title: San Antonio Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting San Antonio with a Z-Score of +3.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in San Antonio has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 9.6 GG, while the Humidity is at 71%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 8.4 km/h, which is exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
